what_it_does: Python framework for building shareable web UIs around ML models and media pipelines.
succinct_summary: Useful for quickly wiring Morgan avatar controls, uploads, audio, and inference demos without a custom frontend.
possible_use: Build operator-facing prototypes for lipsync, puppeteering, model selection, and batch generation workflows.
important_notes: Large general-purpose framework; use as a demo shell, not as the final low-latency avatar runtime by default. README hint: <!-- DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE DIRECTLY. INSTEAD EDIT THE `readme_template.md` OR `guides/01_getting-started/01_quickstart.md` TEMPLATES AND THEN RUN `render_readme.py` SCRIPT. -->
